name: Orange Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush vanilla wafers to make fine crumbs.
2. Add powdered sugar, butter, and orange juice concentrate to the crushed wafers. Mix well until a dough forms.
3. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Roll each ball in pecans or coconut (or a mixture of both).
5. Chill the balls until firm.
Makes about 6 dozen.
